adopted_roadmap.fase_ii_summary: 3 DGs shipped + 3 Baselines PASS validated: DG-127 A (signature attachment) H3-implicit-con-verdict-shift Baseline-11 INC→FP; DG-128 A (body scan taint propagation) H3-implicit-refinement Baseline-12 categorical FP; DG-129 A (module trust boundary tagging) H3-STRUCTURAL-SHIFT Baseline-13 FP→INC. Cumulative achievement: North Star principle empíricamente REALIZED — el LLM ahora razona sobre findings cross-module con contexto de signature + body content + attack surface. Duration real: 3 días vs estimate 3-4 semanas.
adopted_roadmap.current_phase_progress: 0/3 DGs (DG-130 A pending como primer DG). FASE III cubre: DG-130 A per-fingerprint verdict persistence + reproducibilidad cross-provider (backlog #4), DG-131 A R20 cross-finding correlation (Stage 3 groups), DG-132 A R22 diff-aware mode.

activeDG.title: Per-fingerprint verdict persistence + reproducibilidad cross-provider — primer DG de FASE III 'trust cross-session'
activeDG.predecessor_fase_ii_status: FASE II COMPLETE PASS — 3/3 DGs validated con 3 Baselines cross-workspace empíricos. R18 v2 completo + R19 shipped. El pain point original del North Star principle (Baseline-8b INC 0.45 'without seeing internals') transformado empíricamente a Baseline-13 INC 0.70 con caution structural sobre HIGH surface exposure.
activeDG.empirical_motivation_fase_iii: Baseline-13 reveló verdict shift FP 0.95 → INC 0.70 cross-baseline sobre EL MISMO finding. Empíricamente: users que ven verdict inconsistency entre re-triage runs pueden confundirse. FASE III attaca: (1) fingerprint stability cross-scans (mismo finding tiene consistent fingerprint sobre scans consecutivos); (2) verdict history tracking (users pueden ver 'verdict changed from FP 0.95 to INC 0.70 in this scan because Trust boundary signal added'); (3) reproducibilidad cross-provider (si user cambia deepseek → openai → anthropic, verdict debe ser reproducible dentro de tolerance); (4) diff-aware mode (mostrar diff vs último scan — 'N new findings since main', '2 re-classified INCs').

candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A1_Conservative: Solo fingerprint stability + basic verdict history — un finding sobre múltiples scans consecutive genera el mismo fingerprint (canonical hash de path+ruleId+startLine). Nueva table 'verdict_history' con { fingerprint, verdict, confidence, rationale, timestamp, provider_label }. Sidebar muestra 'previously verdicts' section
candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A2_Balanced_RECOMMENDED: Sub-A1 + verdict change detection + diff-aware mode básico. Cuando re-triage cambia verdict (FP→INC como Baseline-13), emit banner explícito en el sidebar 'Verdict changed since last scan — why?' con delta rationale. Diff-aware mode simple: 'N new findings since last scan', 'M re-classified'
candidate_sub_dgs.Sub_A3_Innovative: Sub-A2 + reproducibilidad cross-provider (voting mechanism entre providers) + explicit trust boundary reasoning trace + Stage 3 cross-finding correlation R20 preview. Multi-cycle scope real
